ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "average_roa" REAL /* Average Return on Assets for the industry */,
  "average_roe" REAL /* Average Return on Equity for the industry */,
  "average_pe_ratio" REAL /* Average Price-to-Earnings ratio for the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "average_revenue_growth" REAL /* Average revenue growth rate for the sector */,
  "average_profit_margin" REAL /* Average profit margin for the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial ratio */,
  "ratio_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial ratio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial ratio */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the ratio */,
  "industry_standard" REAL /* Industry standard value for the ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industry" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sector" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "sector_id")
)
